scripts.dev: pnpm build && concurrently -k -n functions,emulators,mobile "pnpm --filter @tastes/functions build:watch" "node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:start --project demo-tastes --export-on-exit=.firebase-data" "pnpm --filter @tastes/mobile start"
scripts.dev:emulators: pnpm build && node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:start --project demo-tastes --export-on-exit=.firebase-data
scripts.dev:emulators:restore: pnpm build && node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:start --project demo-tastes --import=.firebase-data --export-on-exit=.firebase-data
scripts.test:rules: node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:exec --project demo-tastes --only firestore "vitest run tests/rules"
